name: Foreign Trust Election for Expatriate Bequests

eligibility.description: Applies to foreign trusts receiving property from covered expatriates for the benefit of U.S. persons.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A foreign trust receiving a covered gift or bequest can elect to be treated as a domestic trust, potentially simplifying tax compliance and shifting the tax burden to the trust level rather than the beneficiaries.
